markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 27, 2026 1 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 86.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 86.99° on Jun 27, 2026 at 1am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Yasser El Hanafi records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Egypt vs IR Iran professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Egypt vs IR Iran professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Yasser El Hanafi: 1+ goals

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.

markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to IR Iran in the Egypt vs Iran professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 26, 2026 after 90 minutes plus stoppage time (does not include extra time or penalties). Own goals count towards the team awarded the goal.
markets.title: Will IR Iran score over 3.5 goals?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Thiago Seyboth Wild wins the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Semifinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Semifinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Thiago Seyboth Wild win the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna: Semifinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Juan Manuel La Serna wins the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Semifinal after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Challenger Piracicaba Semifinal after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Juan Manuel La Serna win the Seyboth Wild vs La Serna: Semifinal match?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Cody Bellinger records 4+ hits in the New York Y vs Boston professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jun 27, 2026 at 1:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Cody Bellinger is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Cody Bellinger starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
